g.text: PLATFORM repo · single source of truth
tofu/ lives in the same repo
bootstrapped ONCE by hand — then it manages itself
argo sync-waves — what deploys in which order:
opens dependency PRs against both repos
TENANT drova — own repos, own pipeline
fully separated from the platform repo (talos-homelab)
argocd only points at this repo — platform & tenant stay decoupled
NetBird — private vpn mesh · 0 open ports -> roadmap: zero-trust
immutable talos nodes · spread across both hardware zones
TLS by cert-manager · cilium L2 loadbalancer · OWASP crs · rate-limiting
eBPF cni, kube-proxy-less, hubble · istio sidecar mesh · mTLS · kiali -> roadmap: ambient
6 go services · grpc internal · kafka events
drova · n8n · keycloak — HA · poolers · pitr
rbd · cephfs · rgw object store (S3) · replica 2 · zone-aware, survives a host loss
velero + cnpg barman backups land in rgw · restore drills
logs: all pods -> vector -> elasticsearch (SIEM) + loki | metrics: exporters -> prometheus |
traces -> otel -> tempo · jaeger grafana dashboards · slo burn-rate alerting · gatus status page
admission policies · git-safe secrets · default-deny netpols
the proxmox VM'S up top ARE these cluster nodes
